name: z-bridge-soft-deploy
description: Cloudflare Pages soft bundle (wrangler.toml). Bundle is produced by hub script deploy:cf-z-bridge:bundle.

scripts.start: node -e "console.log('Preview: npm run deploy:cf-z-bridge:pages:preview from hub root after bundle.'); process.exit(0);"
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('Run bridge readiness scripts from hub (readiness:*).'); process.exit(0);"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('Lint from hub root: npm run lint:root'); process.exit(0);"
